case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ROXANA FLORES HERNANDEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788. 60(A) (TRANSACTION ID # 100039068) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROXANA FLORES $1,693.64 PRINCIPAL, $241.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,934.64, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROXANA FLORES DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-23-2018

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100033705), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAY-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, ROXANA FLORES
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100039068) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 25
ORDER AND DECLARATION OF CLERK REPRODUCE MISSING DOCUMENTS
DECLARATION COMPLIANCE WITH SECTION 1033(B)(2) AND WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100039068) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
